'''nabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrilinearly|quadrilinearly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-b-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrilinearly|quadrilinearly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:nabate|nabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nabatesher|nabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nabatesherĂ«m|nabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nabatero|nabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nabateshĂ«|nabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nabateshĂ«m|nabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinabatero|gokinabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinabateshĂ«|gokinabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinabateshĂ«m|gokinabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonabankerom|gonabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonabankeshĂ«|gonabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonabankeshĂ«m|gonabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonabankeya|gonabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nabaterom|nabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nabatemu|nabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nabateya|nabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinabaterom|gokinabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinabatemu|gokinabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinabateya|gokinabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:nababate|nababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nababatesher|nababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nababatesherĂ«m|nababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nababatero|nababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nababateshĂ«|nababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nababateshĂ«m|nababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinababatero|gokinababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinababateshĂ«|gokinababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinababateshĂ«m|gokinababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonababankerom|gonababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonababankeshĂ«|gonababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonababankeshĂ«m|gonababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonababankeya|gonababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nababaterom|nababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nababatemu|nababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nababateya|nababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinababaterom|gokinababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinababatemu|gokinababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinababateya|gokinababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠbĂŠte|nĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠbĂŠtesher|nĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠbĂŠtero|nĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠbĂŠtero|gokinĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠbĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonĂŠbĂŠnkeya|gonĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠbĂŠterom|nĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠbĂŠtemu|nĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠbĂŠteya|nĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠbĂŠterom|gokinĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠbĂŠteya|gokinĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:nafbafte|nafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nafbaftesher|nafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafbaftesherĂ«m|nafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafbaftero|nafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nafbafteshĂ«|nafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafbafteshĂ«m|nafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafbaftero|gokinafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinafbafteshĂ«|gokinafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafbafteshĂ«m|gokinafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonafbafnkerom|gonafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonafbafnkeshĂ«|gonafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonafbafnkeshĂ«m|gonafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonafbafnkeya|gonafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafbafterom|nafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafbaftemu|nafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nafbafteya|nafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafbafterom|gokinafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafbaftemu|gokinafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinafbafteya|gokinafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
